message:
fix: replace daemonLogger with *slog.Logger for proper structured logging

Remove the custom daemonLogger wrapper type which had a broken toSlogArgs
function (was a no-op, causing BADKEY log entries). Replace with direct
*slog.Logger usage throughout the daemon code.

Key changes:
- Remove daemonLogger type, toSlogArgs, and wrapper methods
- Replace all daemonLogger params with *slog.Logger
- Convert printf-style log.Info(format, args...) to structured
  log.Info(msg, key, value) throughout daemon code
- Enable sloglint linter in golangci.yml
- Update test files to use *slog.Logger directly

Co-Authored-By: Matt Armstrong <matt@lickey.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ linters:
     - misspell
     - unconvert
     - unparam
+    - sloglint
 
   settings:
     errcheck:
